approval.approval_note: 2026-07-22 user approval to arrange the remaining option C pre-activation evidence (calendar capture, session list, retention policy draft, work-unit preparation, terms review). The per-session 750-session capture is NOT approved and was not executed.
approval.provider_calls_note: Exactly 1 bounded official-calendar GET (holidaySchedule), same pattern as the approved 2308 trial capture. No market-data session GETs were issued. Top-level provider_calls_made_by_repository remains 0.

completed_items.limitation: The endpoint covers only ROC year 115 (2026); 2023-07-20..2025-12-31 is uncovered.
Full-window enumeration requires resolving the 2023-2025 calendar coverage gap (options recorded in the session-list file; extra GETs require separate user approval).

highlights: raw per-session CSV stored gzip-compressed under outputs/ (gitignored), caller-owned
per-session caps: 5 MB uncompressed / 2 MB gzip (S9 audit); ~0.7 MB gzip observed in trial
sha256 of uncompressed CSV plus gzip sha256 recorded per session
attribution 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所; normalized fixtures enter repo only after policy approval, ToS resolution, and work-unit digest approval

blockers: full-window session enumeration missing (calendar coverage gap)

evidence.conclusion: TWSE 使用條款 prohibits automated/scripted downloads without TWSE consent; open-data license clearly covers only the data.gov.tw datasets (daily, 2017-05 onward), not bulk historical MI_INDEX captures. Human decision required before activation.

acceptance_notes: Top-level source-contract status stays source_contract_blocked; no candidate was admitted and the 750-session capture was not executed.
The calendar capture adds exactly 1 provider call recorded inside option_c_endpoint_assessment.calendar_capture; the activation counter provider_calls_made_by_repository stays 0.
New human gate: the 2026-07-22 terms-of-use review found the TWSE website terms prohibit scripted downloads without consent; option C cannot activate until the user resolves this.
The 2023-2025 calendar coverage gap must be resolved (per-year official calendars or yearly schedule publications) before the session list can be fully enumerated within the 750 cap.
next_human_approval_points: Resolve the terms-of-use conflict: obtain TWSE consent, accept the site CSV download as the consented method with recorded risk acceptance, or abandon option C.
Approve the 2023-2025 calendar coverage resolution (extra per-year calendar GETs or official yearly schedule publications).
Approve the final per-session work-unit digest after the above, before any host egress.
